positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic celestial fox sitting amidst bioluminescent forest flora. The fox should have a clean, iconic silhouette. The background incorporates a large, stylized crescent moon and constellations rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and emerald green. The aesthetic should be neo-illustrative and graphically strong, like high-quality screen-printed artwork. Emphasis on strong contrast between the glowing elements and deep shadows. Central composition, radial symmetry, highly detailed line art with minimal, controlled watercolor washes. Intended for apparel print.
negative: blur, grainy, low quality, fuzzy, distorted, signature, watermark, text, logo, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of frame, jpeg artifacts
